message:
fix: Recreate channels in Start() to support restart after Stop

Previously, stopCh and doneCh were created once in New() and reused
across Start/Stop cycles. If an agent/coordinator was stopped and
restarted, the second Start() would try to use already-closed channels,
causing a panic when pollLoop/monitorLoop tried to close doneCh.

Now channels are recreated in Start() under the mutex lock, ensuring
clean state for each run cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
